mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_context_snapshot ( task_id, run_id, step_index, request_id, provider, model, model_selector, policy_name, policy_version, token_budget, token_estimate, reserved_output_tokens, snapshot_storage_mode, request_snapshot_json, messages_json, tools_json, tool_choice_json, generation_options, request_hash, redaction_policy_version, metadata, created_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{runId}, #{stepIndex}, #{requestId}, #{provider}, #{model}, #{modelSelector}, #{policyName}, #{policyVersion}, #{tokenBudget}, #{tokenEstimate}, #{reservedOutputTokens}, #{snapshotStorageMode}, #{requestSnapshotJson,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{messagesJson,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{toolsJson,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{toolChoiceJson,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{generationOptions,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{requestHash}, #{redactionPolicyVersion}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{createdAt} )
